metadata.description: MCP plugin that fires warnings, errors, and alerts on wasteful Claude API token usage. Auto-suppresses logs and ignored history to keep context lean.

plugins.name: token-saver
plugins.description: MCP plugin that monitors Claude API outputs and fires warnings, errors, and alerts when token usage is wasteful. Detects log noise, repetitive history, and oversized outputs. Auto-suppresses ignored content to keep your context lean.
